description:
The digital catalog development is aimed at determining the effort and efficiency required by a technology enabled solution to transform catalog and brochures of luxury goods into digital format for easy and accurate identification of goods.

The solution is built on AWS leveraging various services such as Amplify, API Gateway, Cognito, S3, Lambda, Rekognition and Textract.
